Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. From 300KB to 69KB per Token: How LLM Architectures Solve the KV Cache Problem 41 upvotes, 5 comments
  2. Show HN: Forkrun – NUMA-aware shell parallelizer (50×–400× faster than parallel) 64 upvotes, 10 comments
  3. GitHub's Historic Uptime 197 upvotes, 46 comments
  4. OkCupid gave 3M dating-app photos to facial recognition firm, FTC says 137 upvotes, 31 comments
  5. Show HN: How This Graybeard Built the Fastest and Freest Postgres BM25 Search 34 upvotes, 5 comments
  6. Accidentally created my first fork bomb with Claude Code 32 upvotes, 5 comments
  7. Open source CAD in the browser (Solvespace) 229 upvotes, 71 comments
  8. Teenage Engineering's PO-32 acoustic modem and synth implementation 27 upvotes, 4 comments
  9. GitHub Monaspace Case Study 87 upvotes, 24 comments
  10. Combinators 115 upvotes, 34 comments
  11. Axios compromised on NPM – Malicious versions drop remote access trojan 1706 upvotes, 683 comments
  12. Microsoft: Copilot is for entertainment purposes only 333 upvotes, 135 comments
  13. A Primer on Long-Duration Life Support 30 upvotes, 7 comments
  14. Cohere Transcribe: Speech Recognition 112 upvotes, 41 comments
  15. The Claude Code Source Leak: fake tools, frustration regexes, undercover mode 284 upvotes, 126 comments
  16. Claude Code's source code has been leaked via a map file in their NPM registry 1692 upvotes, 853 comments
  17. Show HN: Loreline, narrative language transpiled via Haxe: C++/C#/JS/Java/Py/Lua 44 upvotes, 14 comments
  18. Audio tapes reveal mass rule-breaking in Milgram's obedience experiments 174 upvotes, 103 comments
  19. Claude Code users hitting usage limits 'way faster than expected' 228 upvotes, 140 comments
  20. What major works of literature were written after age of 85? 75? 65? 109 upvotes, 68 comments
  21. Securing Elliptic Curve Cryptocurrencies Against Quantum Vulnerabilities [pdf] 34 upvotes, 17 comments
  22. Oracle slashes 30k jobs 755 upvotes, 648 comments
  23. Scotty: A beautiful SSH task runner 28 upvotes, 15 comments
  24. Nematophagous Fungus 10 upvotes, 3 comments
  25. Show HN: PhAIL – Real-robot benchmark for AI models 13 upvotes, 8 comments
  26. I Traced My Traffic Through a Home Tailscale Exit Node 5 upvotes, 2 comments
  27. Accelerating the Next Phase of AI 14 upvotes, 14 comments
  28. Slop is not necessarily the future 99 upvotes, 179 comments
  29. Ask HN: Distributed data centers in our basements 28 upvotes, 46 comments
  30. Show HN: Cerno – CAPTCHA that targets LLM reasoning, not human biology 7 upvotes, 15 comments

Last generated 4:30am, 1 April 2026. Source here.
